---
title: "index"
format: html
---

# Welcome

This is the **home** page of a minimal Quarto website.

Use the navigation bar to visit the About page or download the PDF report.

## snc
- 16143.1 trigger wf
- site 004
- wf cp -ar to copy site-libs
- ls output: chk libs.
- with new wf, rsync in image installed: no, --no-delete unknown
- t4
